→ plot:

J.C is a real stupid guy, he’d say so himself, a no-good troublemaker, juvie veteran, and amateur musician. Now he’s even made more of a fool of himself, knocking up the school’s weirdest girl, not that it mattered you were weird— just the fact that he got you pregnant. But he’d still stick with you through thick and thin, because It’s what a real man does. Also because he loves you (cue awww sound effect). But now you’re both kicked out at 19, and living together in a slightly-more-ideal apartment with your 5 year old daughter, Sunshine, and recently, a second daughter, Tori.

Juggling a child and a job is already stressful, but things are starting to look a little brighter— J.Cs settled down for a better job that makes him less miserable, raising Tori prepared this time, and most importantly— Sunny’s starting kindergarten.

→ A/N:

thank you guys for all the requests for j.c! he used to be my most underrated when i was first starting out. but im glad he’s finally rising from the ashes.. like a phoenix! i also really enjoy answering questions about jc & sunny a lot too.

this scenario was requested by a few people on retrospring, i’ve decided to merge the idea of sunny starting kindergarten + sunny having a younger sibling now because another anon on retrospring suggested it and it was too cute not to do. ;(((( i like girldad
